§6Apiary§f

§aBreed bees to produce honeycombs, waxcombs, and bee grubs!§f

Place a §bQueen Bee§f inside the §bApiary§f to slowly produce §bHoneycombs§f, §bWaxcombs§f, and §bBee Grubs§f (edible, §e1 hunger§f). Placing flowers nearby speeds up production. Queue the Apiary output into a §bPresser§f for automated honey and wax processing.

§6Crafting§f: §e6× Wood Planks§f + §e3× Iron Ingots§f + §e2× Copper Ingots§f + §e1× Honeycomb§f.

§6Bee Production§f:
The Apiary produces three resources as bees work:
- §bHoneycombs§f — Pressed into §bHoney§f and Grain Bait.
- §bWaxcombs§f — Pressed into §bBeeswax§f and Grain Bait.
- §bBee Grubs§f — Edible, used in some advanced recipes.

§6Speed Modifiers§f:
Placing §bflowers§f (any type) adjacent to the Apiary accelerates production. Larger flower rings reduce cycle time further. A complete ring of §e8 flowers§f gives maximum speed.

§6Queen Bee Source§f:
§bQueen Bees§f are obtained from the §bMarket§f, purchased with emeralds. Once placed inside the Apiary, the queen starts the colony.

§eTip§f: Set up multiple Apiaries in a flower garden to scale up honey, beeswax, and bee grub production for downstream Presser automation.
